LanguageData.UB_SNS_JOYaddict.title: JOY addict
LanguageData.UB_SNS_JOYaddict.description: [PAWN_nameDef] struggled with addiction throughout their life, being addicted to the drug JOY. JOY is a hyper-addictive combat drug designed to make the user feel nothing, physically AND emotionally, commonly used by soldiers on the frontlines. [PAWN_nameDef] used and abused painkillers before resorting to using JOY when the effects weren't strong enough. This unfortunately had the side-effect of making [PAWN_objective] into an emotionless husk, struggling to properly socialize and communicate after the addiction set in. Even to today, [PAWN_nameDef] struggles to socialize due to the after effects of JOY addiction.
